title: Agilitas Normalized Transcript Schema
description: Unified schema for normalized transcripts in Agilitas.

dateTime.description: The timestamp of the transcript event (ISO 8601).

agent.description: Name or ID of the agent.

customer.description: Name or ID of the customer.

fullTranscript.description: Complete text of the transcript with speaker names.

customerTranscript.description: Complete text of only the customer's parts.
